dimensions.name: Relevant experience
dimensions.description: Years and quality of experience in procurement, supply chain, or coordination roles.

dimensions.name: Skills fit
dimensions.description: Match to role: Tally/ERP, PO tracking, vendor coordination, inventory, multi-site coordination.

dimensions.name: Communication & clarity
dimensions.description: Clarity of written responses, structure, and professionalism in emails and case study.

dimensions.name: Relocation / commitment
dimensions.description: Willingness to relocate to Umargam or commute; commitment to the role.

dimensions.name: Case study / problem-solving
dimensions.description: Quality of case study response: prioritisation, stakeholders involved, concrete steps, awareness of impact.

dimensions.name: Behavioural (DICE)
dimensions.description: Quality of DICE answers: difficult feedback, vendor vs alternate, learning quickly, prioritisation under pressure.
